content.text:
Here is what the repo already had and what was verified.

## Status: Task A is done

The prior work in `Procertus-ui-experiment/apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding` already matches [task-a-wire-vite-design-system.md](https://github.com/...). Nothing further was required for a green build.

### Checklist

| Requirement | Implementation |
|---------------|----------------|
| **Dependencies** | `@procertus-ui/ui` / `@procertus-ui/ui-lib` `workspace:*`, React 19, `tailwindcss` / `@tailwindcss/vite` ^4.2, `@workspace/typescript-config`, TypeScript ~5.9, Vite + `@vitejs/plugin-react` — see `package.json`. |
| **Vite** | `react()`, `tailwindcss()`, `resolve.dedupe` for `react`, `react-dom`, `@procertus-ui/ui`, `server.fs.allow` → monorepo root — see `vite.config.ts`. |
| **CSS** | `@import "@procertus-ui/ui/globals.css";` then `@source "./**/*.{ts,tsx}";` in `src/index.css`. |
| **TypeScript** | `tsconfig.app.json` extends `@workspace/typescript-config/react-library.json`, `types: ["vite/client"]`, `resolveJsonModule`, relaxed `noUnusedLocals` / `noUnusedParameters` in the app only. |
| **Entry** | `main.tsx` imports `./index.css`, wraps with `ThemeProvider` and `ModeProvider` from `@procertus-ui/ui`. |
| **UI** | `App.tsx`: `Button` plus `bg-background`, `text-foreground`, `text-muted-foreground`, spacing utilities; no `@workspace/ui`. |
| **Build** | From repo root: `bun install` then `cd apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding && bun run build` — **exit 0** (re-run after review). |

### Note on `@procertus-ui/ui-lib`

Importing from the **package root** `@procertus-ui/ui-lib` pulls the full public surface (including `user-authentication`), and `tsc -b` on the app then typechecks those files; that currently fails with several `TS2559` errors in `packages/ui-lib`. The task is satisfied by declaring `ui-lib` in `package.json` and not importing the root barrel from the app yet. For a real `ui-lib` import in app code before those forms are fixed, use a **narrow subpath** (you can add e.g. `"./lib/utils": "./src/lib/utils.ts"` to `ui-lib`’s `exports` and import from `@procertus-ui/ui-lib/lib/utils`) or fix the underlying `user-authentication` typings.

I briefly tried a root `import { cn } from "@procertus-ui/ui-lib"` in `App.tsx`; that broke `bun run build` for the reason above, so **`App.tsx` was restored** to the minimal version that passes the task’s build criterion.

[REDACTED]

content.text:
Here is what changed.

### Canonical module
- **Location:** `packages/ui/src/vite-workspace-ui-alias.ts` (under `src/` so `tsc` stays happy with `package.json` `"exports"` and `resolvePackageJsonExports`).
- **Public entry:** `@procertus-ui/ui/vite-workspace-ui-alias` — declared in `packages/ui/package.json`:

```json
"./vite-workspace-ui-alias": "./src/vite-workspace-ui-alias.ts"
```

- **Behavior:** Same as before, including the **ui-lib fallback** (`localSrc` then `uiSrc` when the importer is under `packageRoot`). Plugin id renamed to `procertus-ui-workspace-at-alias` (not Storybook-specific).

### Consumers (Procertus-ui-experiment)
- `packages/ui/.storybook/main.ts` → `import { workspaceUiAliasPlugin } from "@procertus-ui/ui/vite-workspace-ui-alias"`
- `packages/ui-lib/.storybook/main.ts` → same
- `apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding/vite.config.ts` → same  
- **Removed:** `packages/ui/.storybook/vite-workspace-ui-alias.ts` and `packages/ui-lib/.storybook/vite-workspace-ui-alias.ts`

### TypeScript (`packages/ui/tsconfig.json`)
- Set **`rootDir`: `./src`** to clear **TS2209** (ambiguous project root for export map).
- **`include`** is only `src/**/*` (`.storybook` is no longer part of `bun run build` / `tsc` for `ui`). Storybook still runs; only the library typecheck scope changed.

### procertus-docs mirror
The same layout and imports are applied under **`procertus-docs/ui-experiment/`** (canonical file, `package.json` export, Storybook mains, deleted `.storybook` copies).

### How other Vite apps should wire it
```ts
import { workspaceUiAliasPlugin } from "@procertus-ui/ui/vite-workspace-ui-alias";

const packageRoot = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url));
const uiPackageRoot = path.join(monorepoRoot, "packages", "ui");

plugins: [
  workspaceUiAliasPlugin({ packageRoot, uiPackageRoot }),
  react(),
  tailwindcss(),
];
```

`bun run build` succeeds for **`Procertus-ui-experiment/packages/ui`** and **`apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding`**.  
`procertus-docs/ui-experiment/packages/ui` **`bun run build`** still fails on a separate issue (**TS2688** / `minimatch` types); that was not introduced by this refactor. If you want `.storybook` back under `ui`’s `tsc`, we can add a small `packages/ui/.storybook/tsconfig.json` that extends the root config.

[REDACTED]

Also demo and showcase most of the available design tokens that are being used in the primitives, and use them to set up some custom components in both the UI library and the application itself.

input.contents:
# DesignTokensShowcase

Scaffolded with `scaffold workspace-ui add-component DesignTokensShowcase --variant section`, then expanded into a **token + primitive gallery** for prototype apps.

## Pieces

| Export | Role |
|--------|------|
| `DesignTokensShowcase` | Tabs: overview, semantic colors, shape/depth, form controls — uses Card, Alert, Field, Tabs, typography, etc. |
| `PrototypeSurfaceMarquee` | Three tiles using `--gradient-*` CSS variables + Badge. |
| `TokenSwatch` | Reusable label + color tile for swatch grids. |

## Consumption

- **Storybook:** `ui-lib/DesignTokensShowcase` stories.
- **Apps (recommended):** `import { DesignTokensShowcase, … } from "@procertus-ui/ui-lib/design-tokens-showcase"` so `tsc` does not pull the whole ui-lib barrel.
- **Barrel:** also re-exported from `@procertus-ui/ui-lib` root `index.ts`.

## Checklist

1. Keep **presentation-only** — routing and data live in apps.
2. **Primitives** — import from `@procertus-ui/ui` only; do not run `shadcn add` in ui-lib.

content.text:
Here is what was implemented.

### Prototype app (`apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding`)
- **`react-router-dom`** — `BrowserRouter` in `main.tsx` (wrapping `ThemeProvider` / `ModeProvider`).
- **Routing** — `App.tsx`: `/` → `<Navigate to="/design-system" replace />`, `/design-system` → `DesignSystemPage`.
- **`DesignSystemPage`** — Toolbar + hero + `PrototypeSurfaceMarquee` + separator + full `DesignTokensShowcase` (layout padding lives on the page; showcase gets `className="mx-0 max-w-none px-0 py-0"` to avoid double gutters).
- **App-only components**
  - **`BrandGradientHero`** — `Card` + `var(--gradient-primary)`, `text-heading-foreground`, `Muted`, `text-primary` accent line.
  - **`AppDesignToolbar`** — `ModeToggle` + copy using `bg-card`, `border-border`, `shadow-[var(--shadow-proc-xs)]`.

### UI-lib (`packages/ui-lib`)
- **Scaffolded** `DesignTokensShowcase` (section template), then **replaced** with a real gallery:
  - **Tabs**: Overview (alerts + typography), Semantic colors (`TokenSwatch` grid + brand primary ramp), Shape & depth (radius + `--shadow-proc-*`), Form controls (`Field`, `Input`, `Switch`, `Checkbox`, `Progress`, `Slider`).
  - **Primitives**: `Tabs`, `Card`, `Badge`, `Button`, `Alert`, `Separator`, `H1`–`H3`, `P` / `Lead` / `Muted` / `Small`, `Field*` suite, `Input`, `Label`, `Switch`, `Checkbox`, `Slider`, `Progress`.
- **New presentational pieces** (same folder, exported together):
  - **`TokenSwatch`** — labeled color tile (semantic utilities + small type sample).
  - **`PrototypeSurfaceMarquee`** — three tiles using `--gradient-primary`, `--gradient-accent`, `--gradient-blend` with `Badge`.
- **Stories** (`DesignTokensShowcase.stories.tsx`): **Full gallery**, **With header slot** (marquee in `headerAddon`), **TokenSwatch only**, **Marquee only**.
- **`COMPONENT.md`** — updated for the new API and exports.
- **`package.json` export** — `"./design-tokens-showcase": "./src/components/design-tokens-showcase/index.ts"` so apps can import **without** pulling the whole ui-lib barrel (recommended in `COMPONENT.md`).
- **Root `index.ts`** — re-exports `DesignTokensShowcase`, `PrototypeSurfaceMarquee`, `TokenSwatch` and their prop types.

### Auth forms (ui-lib)
- **`FieldError`** usage fixed to `errors={[{ message: fieldErrors.* }]}` so **`bun run build`** in `packages/ui-lib` succeeds again (was failing TS2559).

### How to import in other apps
```ts
import {
  DesignTokensShowcase,
  PrototypeSurfaceMarquee,
  TokenSwatch,
} from "@procertus-ui/ui-lib/design-tokens-showcase";
```

### Verification
- `packages/ui-lib` — `bun run build` ✅  
- `packages/ui` — `bun run build` ✅  
- `apps/frontend-pt1-extranet-onboarding` — `bun run build` ✅  

Run **`bun run dev`** in the app and open **`/`** — you should land on **`/design-system`**. Storybook: **`bun run storybook`** from `packages/ui-lib` and open **ui-lib / DesignTokensShowcase**.

[REDACTED]
